mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.user_acs_log ( user_oid, user_id, acs_type, rqt_uri, rqt_mthd, rqt_qry, rqt_bdy_sz, stts_cd, rspns_bdy_sz, rspns_time_ms, error_msg, rfpr_url, rfpr_type, srch_kywd, ip_addr, user_agt, brwsr_nm, brwsr_ver, os_nm, os_ver, dvc_type, ssn_id, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{userOid}, #{userId}, #{acsType}, #{rqtUri}, #{rqtMthd}, #{rqtQry}, #{rqtBdySz}, #{sttsCd}, #{rspnsBdySz}, #{rspnsTimeMs}, #{errorMsg}, #{rfprUrl}, #{rfprType}, #{srchKywd}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgt}, #{brwsrNm}, #{brwsrVer}, #{osNm}, #{osVer}, #{dvcType}, #{ssnId}, IFNULL(#{regId}, 'SYSTEM'), IFNULL(#{regDt}, NOW()) )
